title: Selling Online When PayPal Is Not Available in Your Country: What Actually Works When You Are in a Restricted Country
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: Having a great digital product and being unable to collect payment is a frustrating reality for many creators in restricted countries, where platforms like PayPal are not available, leaving them wondering how to sell online without this crucial payment gateway, and this is where the search for alternative solutions begins, with many turning to other platforms only to find they too have limitations.
What You Are Actually Comparing

When comparing payment platforms, what you are actually looking at is the ability to reach a global audience without restrictions, and this is where traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe fall short, as they have strict compliance rules that exclude many countries, making it difficult for creators to sell their products worldwide, and this is a major hurdle that needs to be overcome in order to succeed in the digital marketplace.
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip, which are popular among digital creators, also have limitations when it comes to serving creators in restricted countries, as they often require a PayPal or Stripe account to receive payments, which can be a major obstacle for those who do not have access to these services, and this is where the need for alternative solutions becomes clear, as creators need a way to sell their products and receive payments without being restricted by traditional platforms.
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, offers a different approach, as it does not rely on traditional payment processors and instead uses blockchain technology to facilitate transactions, which means that creators can sell their products and receive payments without being restricted by geographic location or traditional banking infrastructure, and this is a game-changer for creators in restricted countries, as it allows them to reach a global audience and sell their products without limitations.
The traditional payment platforms are not designed to serve creators in restricted countries, and this is a major obstacle to success in the digital marketplace.
The Real Cost Difference

When it comes to the cost of using traditional platforms versus crypto-native infrastructure, the difference is significant, as traditional platforms often charge transaction fees and require creators to pay for payment processing, whereas crypto-native infrastructure offers a more cost-effective solution, with lower transaction fees and no need for traditional payment processing, and this can make a big difference for creators who are just starting out or who have limited budgets, as it allows them to keep more of their hard-earned money.
Which One to Use and Why

So, which one to use and why, the answer is clear, crypto-native infrastructure is the way to go for creators in restricted countries, as it offers a more flexible, cost-effective, and reliable solution for selling digital products and receiving payments, and with platforms like Unchained Commerce offering a range of tools and services, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, creators have everything they need to succeed in the digital marketplace, without being held back by traditional platforms.
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

For creators in Nigeria, Ghana, and other restricted countries, the solution lies in using crypto-native infrastructure, which allows them to sell their digital products and receive payments without being restricted by traditional platforms, and with the right tools and services, such as those offered by Unchained Commerce, creators can reach a global audience and succeed in the digital marketplace, without being held back by limitations, and this means that they can focus on what they do best, creating great products and serving their customers, rather than worrying about how to get paid.

Crypto-native infrastructure is the key to unlocking global sales and revenue for creators in restricted countries, as it offers a more flexible and cost-effective solution for selling digital products and receiving payments.
Related Topics Worth Reading

For creators who are looking for alternatives to traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip, the solution lies in using crypto-native infrastructure, which offers a more flexible and cost-effective solution for selling digital products and receiving payments, and with the rise of crypto-native platforms, creators now have more options than ever before, to sell their products and reach a global audience, without being restricted by traditional platforms, and this is a major opportunity for creators to succeed in the digital marketplace.
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before launching your digital product store, make sure you have the right tools and services in place, including a reliable crypto-native infrastructure, such as the Core Shop Engine, which provides automated delivery and payment verification, and the Web3 Wallet Connect, which allows for seamless wallet integration, and the Admin Dashboard, which provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, and with these tools in place, you can focus on creating great products and serving your customers, rather than worrying about the technical details of selling and receiving payments.

Success in the digital marketplace means being able to sell your products and receive payments without restrictions, and this is what crypto-native infrastructure provides, a reliable and cost-effective solution for creators to reach a global audience.
